name: 100 Hidden Kooky & Hiking Boots
short_description: Welcome to another kooky game series! Find 100 hidden silly characters with unusual behaviours on a BIG mountain scene & an additional 100 hidden hiking boots to complete the game. Also, play mini challenges to get help with your quest.
detailed_description:
Search for hidden characters with unusual and silly behaviors in a hand-drawn, interactive scene set on a mountain. These kooky characters are cleverly concealed in plain sight among others. Additionally, there are a few mini-games to challenge you and earn credits that will aid in discovering the kooky characters. To complete the game, you also have to find all 100 hiking boots.

------/ Game Features /------

- Gameplay length = ~30 min

- 100+ targets to find

- Mini games available.

- Different color modes

- controller support

- 100 Achievements
